> **Document status (2026-05-17):** Historical reference. This May 11 inventory is useful for architecture context, but it is not the current launch-readiness source of truth.

# Sevent Codebase Inventory
**Repo:** `D:/Mufeed/Sevent/Code`
**Date:** 2026-05-11
**Generated by:** opencode plan agent · kimi-for-coding/k2p6 · ~18 min run

---

## 1. Stack Summary

| Dimension | Value |
|---|---|
| **Framework** | Next.js 16.2.3 (App Router) |
| **React** | 19.2.4 |
| **Language** | TypeScript 5.x |
| **Package manager** | pnpm |
| **Auth** | Supabase Auth (`@supabase/ssr`, `@supabase/supabase-js`) |
| **DB client** | Supabase (`@supabase/supabase-js`, `@supabase/ssr`) |
| **i18n** | `next-intl` 4.9.1 |
| **UI library** | shadcn/ui + Radix UI primitives + Tailwind CSS v4 |
| **State management** | React Server Components + Server Actions (no global client state lib) |
| **Forms** | `react-hook-form` 7.72.1 + `@hookform/resolvers` |
| **Validation** | Zod 4.3.6 |
| **Email** | Resend (`resend`, `@react-email/components`, `@react-email/render`) |
| **CSS** | Tailwind CSS v4, `tw-animate-css`, `tailwind-merge` |
| **Testing** | Vitest 2.1.9 (`@vitest/ui`) |
| **Notable extras** | `@dnd-kit`, `html2canvas`, `leaflet` + `react-leaflet`, `sonner`, `motion`, `cmdk`, `date-fns` |

---

## 2. Top-level Layout

### Repo root

| Folder | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `Claude Docs/` | Project documentation, plans, runbooks, specs, diagrams, email templates, build scripts |
| `scripts/` | Build scripts, seeders, DB backup/safe-stop shell scripts |
| `supabase/` | Migrations, local config, seed data |
| `public/` | Static assets (favicon, fonts, images) |
| `src/` | Application source |

### `src/`

| Folder | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `src/app/` | Next.js App Router pages, layouts, route handlers, server actions |
| `src/components/` | React components grouped by domain |
| `src/lib/` | Business logic, auth, domain helpers, Supabase clients, Zod schemas |
| `src/i18n/` | next-intl configuration (`request.ts`) |
| `src/messages/` | Translation JSON bundles (`en.json`, `ar.json`) |
| `src/proxy.ts` | Proxy configuration (likely for local dev/API routing) |

### `src/app/` route groups

| Group | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `(public)` | Unauthenticated marketing surface (landing, categories, supplier profiles) |
| `(auth)` | Sign-in / sign-up flows |
| `(organizer)` | Organizer (buyer) dashboard, events, RFQs, bookings, messages |
| `(supplier)` | Supplier dashboard, catalog, quotes, bookings, calendar, profile |
| `(admin)` | Admin dashboard, verifications, feedback queue, messaging monitor |
| `(onboarding)` | Supplier onboarding wizard |
| `_actions/` | Shared server actions (feedback, messaging) |
| `_components/` | Shared app-level components (DirectionProvider, NotificationBell, etc.) |
| `api/` | Route handlers (messaging polling) |

## 3. Route Map (App Router)

**Component type rule:** Pages with `"use client"` are Client Components; all others are Server Components.
**Finding:** Exactly **1** Client Component page exists (`/organizer/rfqs/new`); all other **48** pages are Server Components.

### (public)

| URL Path | File Path | Description | SC / CC |
|---|---|---|---|
| `/` | `src/app/(public)/page.tsx` | Landing page: hero, category grid, supplier showcase, FAQ, testimonials | SC |
| `/categories` | `src/app/(public)/categories/page.tsx` | Public category browser (top-level categories) | SC |
| `/categories/[parent]` | `src/app/(public)/categories/[parent]/page.tsx` | Subcategory grid for a parent category | SC |
| `/s/[slug]` | `src/app/(public)/s/[slug]/page.tsx` | Public supplier profile page | SC |
| `/privacy` | `src/app/(public)/privacy/page.tsx` | Privacy policy | SC |
| `/terms` | `src/app/(public)/terms/page.tsx` | Terms of service | SC |

## 4. API & Route Handlers

| File Path | HTTP Methods | URL Path | Purpose |
|---|---|---|---|
| `src/app/api/messaging/threads/[id]/route.ts` | `GET` | `/api/messaging/threads/[id]?since=<iso>` | Polling endpoint: returns new message count + latest timestamp for a thread |
| `src/app/(organizer)/organizer/rfqs/[id]/quotes/export.csv/route.ts` | `GET` | `/organizer/rfqs/[id]/quotes/export.csv` | CSV export of quote-comparison grid (UTF-8 BOM for Excel/Arabic) |
| `src/app/(admin)/admin/verifications/[id]/logo/route.ts` | `GET` | `/admin/verifications/[id]/logo` | Signed redirect to supplier logo in storage (admin-only) |
| `src/app/(admin)/admin/verifications/[id]/doc/[docId]/preview/route.ts` | `GET` | `/admin/verifications/[id]/doc/[docId]/preview` | Signed redirect to supplier doc preview in storage (admin-only) |

## 5. Server Actions

| File Path | Exported Functions | Purpose |

| `src/app/(auth)/actions.ts` | `signUpAction`, `signUpSupplierAction`, `signInAction`, `signOutAction`, `startGoogleOAuthAction` | Auth flows: register, login, OAuth init, logout |
| `src/app/(organizer)/organizer/events/actions.ts` | `createEventAction`, `addBandAction` | Create event + auto-publish band as RFQs; add single band |
| `src/app/(organizer)/organizer/rfqs/actions.ts` | `listMyEventsAction`, `listCategoriesAction`, `previewAutoMatchAction`, `searchApprovedSuppliersAction`, `sendRfqAction` | RFQ wizard data loaders + transactional send via `send_rfq_tx` RPC |
| `src/app/(organizer)/organizer/rfqs/[id]/quotes/actions.ts` | `acceptQuoteAction`, `requestProposalAction`, `cancelProposalRequestAction` | Accept quote (booking creation); proposal request/cancel |

| `src/app/(organizer)/organizer/notifications/actions.ts` | `markOneReadAction`, `markAllReadAction` | Mark notifications read (organizer) |

| `src/app/(supplier)/supplier/rfqs/[id]/proposal-upload/actions.ts` | `respondToProposalRequestAction` | Fulfill organizer proposal request with PDF upload |
| `src/app/(supplier)/supplier/bookings/[id]/actions.ts` | `confirmBookingAction`, `cancelBookingAction` | Supplier confirm/decline booking via RPC |
| `src/app/(supplier)/supplier/profile/actions.ts` | `updateProfileCustomizationAction`, `updateBioAction` | Update accent color, section order, bio |
| `src/app/(supplier)/supplier/catalog/actions.ts` | `upsertPackageAction`, `togglePackageActiveAction`, `deletePackageAction`, `upsertPricingRuleAction`, `togglePricingRuleActiveAction`, `deletePricingRuleAction` | Catalog CRUD: packages + pricing rules |
| `src/app/(supplier)/supplier/dashboard/celebration-actions.ts` | `dismissCelebrationAction`, `markApprovedSeenAction` | Cookie dismissal + first-seen timestamp for approved banner |
| `src/app/(supplier)/supplier/notifications/actions.ts` | `markOneReadAction`, `markAllReadAction` | Mark notifications read (supplier) |

## 6. Supabase Surface

### Tables

| Table | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `profiles` | Auth user extension: role, full_name, phone, language, terms_accepted_at |
| `suppliers` | Supplier entity: business info, verification_status, geo, publish flags |
| `categories` | 2-level taxonomy (parent_id NULL = top-level) |
| `supplier_categories` | N:N link suppliers to subcategories |
| `supplier_docs` | Verification documents: CR, VAT, IBAN, national address, company profile |
| `supplier_media` | Portfolio items (photos, documents) with sort_order |
| `packages` | Supplier service packages with base pricing |
| `pricing_rules` | Dynamic pricing rules tied to packages or supplier-wide |
| `availability_blocks` | Calendar blocks: manual_block, soft_hold, booked |
| `events` | Organizer events: type, city, venue (PostGIS), dates, budget |
| `rfqs` | Request-for-quote tied to event + subcategory |
| `rfq_invites` | Invitations sent to suppliers (or self-applied) |
| `quotes` | Supplier quote header + status |
| `quote_revisions` | Immutable snapshot of each quote send/revision |
| `quote_proposal_requests` | Organizer-requested technical proposals |
| `bookings` | Confirmed booking linking RFQ, quote, organizer, supplier |
| `reviews` | Double-blind reviews per booking |
| `disputes` | Booking dispute cases |
| `dispute_evidence` | Evidence files/notes for disputes |
| `notifications` | In-app notification inbox rows |
| `app_feedback` | Feedback/bug reports from users |
| `feedback_messages` | Threaded replies inside app_feedback |
| `feedback_campaigns` | Bulk messaging campaigns |

### RLS Policies

RLS is enabled on every user-facing table. Access patterns:

- **Self-owned rows:** `profiles`, `notifications`, `events`, `bookings` (organizer_id or supplier profile match)
- **Public read (published/approved):** `suppliers`, `supplier_categories`, `supplier_media`, `packages`, `availability_blocks`
- **Owner + admin:** `supplier_docs`, `pricing_rules`, `quotes`, `quote_revisions`
- **Organizer-via-event ownership:** `rfqs`, `rfq_invites` (policies join through `events.organizer_id`)
- **Supplier self-service:** `quotes` (supplier_id match), `rfq_invites` (supplier respond), `availability_blocks` (owner)
- **Admin full/read:** Most tables have an `is_admin()` policy
- **No DELETE on feedback:** `app_feedback` has no DELETE policy (audit trail)
- **Storage RLS:** `storage.objects` policies gate by bucket + path prefix ownership via `storage_path_owner_profile()`

### Edge Functions

None found. `supabase/functions/` does not exist.

### Storage Buckets

| Bucket | Visibility | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `supplier-portfolio` | Private (RLS-gated) | Supplier portfolio photos/documents |
| `supplier-docs` | Private (RLS-gated) | Verification docs, technical proposals, company profiles |
| `contracts` | Private (admin/service-role only) | Booking contract PDFs |
| `supplier-logos` | Private (RLS-gated) | Supplier logo images |
| `feedback-screenshots` | Private | Feedback widget screenshot attachments |

---

## 7. Cross-cutting modules

### `src/lib/auth/`
- **`access.ts`** — Core authorization resolver (`resolveAccessForUser`, `requireAccess`, `requireRole`). Collapses role + supplier state into a single `AccessDecision` with `bestDestination` and `allowedRoutePrefixes`. Supports HMAC-signed header forwarding from middleware to RSC.
- **`featureMatrix.ts`** — Feature-to-state mapping matrix (`STATE_CONFIG`) and route-prefix allowlist.
- **`nextParam.ts`** — Sanitizes `?next=` redirect params against allowed prefixes.

### `src/lib/supabase/`
- **`client.ts`** — Browser client singleton (`createBrowserClient`).
- **`server.ts`** — Server client factory + `getCurrentUser()` + `requireRole()` helpers. Returns both user-scoped and service-role admin clients.
- **`middleware.ts`** — Session refresh in Next.js middleware (`updateSession`).
- **`storage.ts`** — Bucket constants, `supplierScopedPath()`, `assertPathBelongsToSupplier()`, signed-URL helpers.
- **`types.ts`** — Hand-curated DB row types and enums (not generated).

### `src/lib/domain/`
Business logic modules:
- **`money.ts`** — `sarToHalalas` / `halalasToSar` conversions.
- **`events.ts`** — Event creation Zod schemas + `BandInput`.
- **`rfq.ts`** — RFQ form schemas, extension parsing (venues/catering/photography/generic).
- **`quote.ts`** — Quote snapshot builder, content hashing, line-item types.
- **`pricing/engine.ts`** — Rule-engine price composition (`composePrice`).
- **`pricing/rules.ts`** — Rule-type definitions + config parser.
- **`pricing/distance.ts`** — PostGIS distance helper (`getDistanceKm`).
- **`matching/autoMatch.ts`** / **`matching/query.ts`** — Auto-match scoring + candidate fetch.
- **`marketplace.ts`** — Marketplace opportunity loaders.
- **`publicBrowse.ts`** — Public category/supplier browsing queries.
- **`supplierProfile.ts`** — Public profile data assembly.
- **`availability.ts`** — Calendar block schemas + error mapping.
- **`booking.ts`** / **`booking/__tests__/`** — Booking state types + integration test helpers for RPCs.
- **`onboarding.ts`** — Onboarding Zod schemas + slug helpers.
- **`taxonomy.ts`** — Category name resolution, segment/slug helpers.
- **`cities.ts`** — Saudi city list + name resolution.
- **`segments.ts`** — Market segment slugs.
- **`formatDate.ts`** — Locale-aware date formatting.
- **`responsiveness.ts`** — Supplier responsiveness scoring.

### `src/lib/messaging/`
- **`threads.ts`** — Thread row types + loaders.
- **`replies.ts`** — `replyAsUser`, `replyAsAdmin`.
- **`compose.ts`** — `composeToUser`, `composeBulk` (campaigns).
- **`read.ts`** — Mark-thread-read helpers (RPC-backed).
- **`notify.ts`** — Best-effort notification fan-out (`notifyAllAdmins`, `notifyMessage`).

### `src/lib/notifications/`
- **`email.ts`** — `sendEmail()` wrapper around Resend with console fallback.
- **`inApp.ts`** — `createNotification()` helper for `notifications` table.
- **`reader.ts`** — Notification list loaders.
- **`templates/`** — React email templates (`SupplierApproved`, `SupplierRejected`).

### `src/lib/onboarding/`
- **`slug.ts`** — `uniqueSupplierSlug()` generator.

### `src/lib/zod/`
- **`i18n.ts`** — Zod v4 locale registration (`registerZodLocale`).

### `src/components/ui/`
Standard shadcn/ui primitives (25+ components): `button`, `dialog`, `dropdown-menu`, `form`, `input`, `select`, `sheet`, `table`, `tabs`, `calendar`, `command`, etc.

### `src/components/ui-ext/`
Extended/reusable layout components: `PageHeader`, `EmptyState`, `MetricCard`, `StatusPill`, `HelperText`, `PreviewProfileButton`.

### `src/components/auth/`
Auth-specific UI: `PhoneInput`, `SignupValueHero`, `SupplierSignupHero`, `TermsCheckbox`.

### `src/components/brand/`
`Logo.tsx`

### `src/components/nav/`
Navigation chrome: `TopNav`, `PublicNav`, `MobileNavSheet`, `NavLinks`, `UserMenu`, `LanguageSwitcher`, `SignUpMenu` + `locale-actions.ts`.

### `src/components/public/`
Public surface components: `LandingHero`, `CategoryGrid`, `SupplierCard`, `SupplierProfileHero`, `PublicFooter`, `GalleryGrid`, `HeroSection`, `FaqSection`, etc.

### `src/components/rfq/`
RFQ-specific: `ShortlistEditor`, extension forms (`CateringExtensionForm`, `PhotographyExtensionForm`, `VenuesExtensionForm`, `GenericExtensionForm`).

### `src/components/supplier/`
Supplier chrome: `ApprovedCelebration`, `CityCombobox`, `SegmentsPicker`, `OpportunitiesPreviewCard`, onboarding subcomponents (`WizardStepper`, `CategoryPillCloud`, `PendingReviewChecklist`, etc.).

### `src/components/feedback/`
In-app feedback widget: `FeedbackWidget`, `FeedbackWidgetLazy`, `FeedbackMenuItem`, screenshot capture, console error buffer hook.

### `src/components/status/`
`StatusView.tsx` — generic status page renderer.

### `src/i18n/`
- **`request.ts`** — next-intl request config: cookie/header locale resolution, Zod locale bootstrap, message loading for `en` / `ar`.

| `build_strategy_summary_en.js` | English strategy summary builder |
| `build_strategy_summary_en_docx.js` | English strategy summary DOCX builder |
| `build_supervisor_report_ar.js` | Arabic supervisor report builder |
| `build_weekly_report_ar.js` | Arabic weekly report builder |
| `build_weekly_report_ar_2026-04-30.js` | Dated weekly report builder (2026-04-30) |
| `build_weekly_report_ar_2026-05-07.js` | Dated weekly report builder (2026-05-07) |
| `convert_to_excalidraw.js` | Converts content to Excalidraw format |
| `crop_rfq_screenshot.js` | Crops RFQ screenshots |
| `swap_rfq_image.js` | Swaps RFQ images in assets |
| `deck/build.js` | Deck generation orchestrator |
| `deck/build_rfq_rfp_walkthrough.js` | RFQ/RFP walkthrough deck builder |
| `deck/build_supplier_onboarding.js` | Supplier onboarding deck builder |
| `deck/html2pptx.js` | HTML-to-PPTX conversion helper |

---

## 9. Internationalization

- **Locales:** `en`, `ar`
- **Bundles:** `src/messages/en.json` (~115 KB), `src/messages/ar.json` (~146 KB)
- **RTL:** Fully supported. Root layout sets `dir="rtl"` and Arabic font (`Almarai`) when locale is `ar`. `components.json` explicitly sets `"rtl": true`.
- **Zod localization:** `src/lib/zod/i18n.ts` registers Zod v4 error maps per request so server-side validation messages match the resolved locale.
- **next-intl config:** `src/i18n/request.ts` resolves locale from `NEXT_LOCALE` cookie first, then `Accept-Language` header, defaulting to `en`.

---

## 10. Notable Gaps or Surprises

- **Single Client Component page.** Only `/organizer/rfqs/new` is a Client Component; every other page is a Server Component. This is a strong RSC-first architecture, but the RFQ wizard is large (~1165 lines).
- **No Edge Functions.** `supabase/functions/` is absent. All backend logic lives in Next.js Server Actions or Postgres RPCs.
- **Stray root-level TS files.** `approve.ts`, `set-supplier-state.ts`, and `update-supplier.ts` sit in the repo root and are explicitly excluded in `tsconfig.json`. They look like one-off admin scripts that leaked out of `scripts/`.
- **TODO/FIXME comments.**
  - All `error.tsx` files and `global-error.tsx` contain `// TODO: localize via next-intl after i18n stability.`
  - `src/lib/domain/matching/autoMatch.ts` has `// TODO(sprint5): replace with verified-win-rate proxy.`
  - `src/lib/domain/matching/reasons.ts` has `// TODO(sprint6): swap the dict for message keys.`
  - `src/app/(admin)/admin/dashboard/page.tsx` has `// TODO(sprint5): admin RFQ detail view.`
- **Inconsistent `loading.tsx` coverage.** Many deep routes have `loading.tsx` (especially under `(supplier)` and `(organizer)`), but several branches lack it entirely (e.g. `(admin)/admin/verifications`, `(admin)/admin/messages`, `(public)/privacy`, `(public)/terms`). No `loading.tsx` exists at route-group level for `(admin)` or `(auth)`.
- **Missing `error.tsx` in `(onboarding)`.** The `(onboarding)` group has no error boundary; root `global-error.tsx` catches everything else.
- **TEMP policy in onboarding.** `submitOnboardingStep3` inserts a sentinel `supplier_docs` row with `file_path = '__TEMP_AWAITING_LEGAL__'` when no documents are uploaded, to satisfy the access state-machine transition. A comment explicitly flags this as temporary.
- **No generated Supabase types.** `src/lib/supabase/types.ts` is hand-maintained. A comment says generated types are "deferred to Sprint 6 hardening."
- **Root-level `not-found.tsx` duplication.** Both `src/app/not-found.tsx` and `src/app/(public)/not-found.tsx` exist with the same TODO comment.
- **Migration count.** 38 migrations exist; the schema has evolved heavily through sprints. Several migrations are ambiguity fixes (`fix_upsert_quote_revision_ambiguity`, `fix_send_rfq_tx_ambiguity`, `fix_marketplace_rls`), indicating iterative RPC hardening.

---

*End of inventory.*
